name: system package updates
command: sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm && ~/Projects/dotfiles/arch/pkgbuilds/install.sh && npm update -g --min-release-age 7 && uv tool upgrade --all --exclude-newer '1 week'

name: prune backups
command: sudo -E borg prune -v --list --keep-within=89d /backuprepo && sudo -E borg compact --progress /backuprepo
